notes: Vela v1.0 Pre-release (opt-in). True multitasking — async shell by default, so foreground apps run alongside background services. Hardware-verified on the Pico 2W (boots, multitasking, async networking, editor). Pre-release — please report bugs.
features: DEVELOPER BUILD — the v0.9.5 multitasking foundation, now the default experience
Multitasking shell is the DEFAULT — background services keep running while you work (classic sync shell stays as the recovery / crash fallback)
Background services: httpd start --bg / status / stop; service list/add/remove/test
Cooperative app framework (appkit) — a foreground app (e.g. sysmon) yields so it runs alongside background services
Full async line editor — history, Tab completion, cursor + word navigation (shared LineEditor with the classic shell)
Background scheduled tasks fire while idle (task background on); async-loop self-test (service test)
